commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=de46db2e51edd561035495b30cbc908e2e197fda)
commands.review_summary:
The PR expands memory-wiki `wiki_apply` to accept `synthesis` and `metadata`, normalizes those aliases to canonical mutation ops, and documents the accepted values.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +35, Docs +3. Total +59 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current `origin/main` documents `openclaw wiki apply synthesis` and `metadata`, while `WikiApplySchema` only accepts `create_synthesis` and `update_metadata`. I did not run a live Gateway reproduction because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor real-behavior proof and a review finding; because proof is missing, this should stay contributor/human handled rather than entering a ClawSweeper repair lane.

target.title: fix(memory-wiki): accept wiki_apply CLI op aliases
target.body:
Summary:
- Accept `wiki_apply` op aliases `synthesis` and `metadata` in the tool schema.
- Normalize those aliases to the canonical `create_synthesis` and `update_metadata` mutations before execution.
- Document the accepted op values in the memory-wiki plugin docs.

Refs:
- Fixes #90303

Verification:
- `env PATH=/Users/zhangbin/.cache/codex-runtimes/codex-primary-runtime/dependencies/node/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/memory-wiki/src/tool.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/apply.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

Notes:
- `pnpm docs:list` was attempted in this sparse checkout, but pnpm's dependency status check failed before docs validation with `ERR_PNPM_UNUSED_PATCH` for `@agentclientprotocol/claude-agent-acp@0.39.0`; this appears to be a sparse-checkout dependency graph limitation rather than a docs content failure.

Real behavior proof:
- Behavior addressed: `wiki_apply` now accepts the CLI-style op values shown to users and agents.
- Real environment tested: local Codex sparse checkout on macOS with Node 24.14.0.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/memory-wiki/src/tool.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/apply.test.ts`.
- Evidence after fix: focused memory-wiki tests pass, including schema and normalizer coverage for `synthesis` and `metadata`.
- Observed result after fix: aliases normalize to canonical operations and the tool schema advertises the aliases.
- What was not tested: live agent tool invocation against a running Gateway.
target.author: leno23
